issue_title: Long notes become intolerably slow to edit
issue_body_preview:
I use notes for my daily chores list. But I never delete chores, ticked off they become sort of a diary over time. Lately the note became very slow to edit. It literally takes seconds for a letter to appear.

The note has become over 17000 lines long over time, Is there a (known) critical limit on t
test_description_zh: 打开一个包含大量内容（例如超过17000行）的笔记，在编辑器中输入文字，观察输入响应速度和编辑流畅度。
expected_result_zh: 在编辑大型笔记时，键盘输入的字符应能即时或近乎即时地显示在编辑器中，编辑操作流畅无明显卡顿或延迟。
